case.title: McCLELLAN v. CHESAPEAKE & OHIO RAILWAY CO.

opinion.h1: McCLELLAN v. CHESAPEAKE & OHIO RAILWAY CO., 381 U.S. 130 (1965)
opinion.h4: McCLELLAN v. CHESAPEAKE & OHIO RAILWAY CO. APPEAL FROM THE COURT OF APPEALS OF OHIO, CUYAHOGA COUNTY. No. 994. Decided May 3, 1965.
opinion.p: Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
John G. Cardinal and Edwin Knachel for appellee.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
